---
title: "Update Profile"
description: "Request an update to an existing member profile on the RC42 portal."
---

## Update Your Profile

::: {.info-box}
Profile updates are handled manually in this initial version of the portal. A self-service update form will be available in a future phase.
:::

### How to Request a Profile Update

To update your existing member profile on the RC42 portal, please:

1. **Send an email** to [isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org](mailto:isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org) with:
   - Your full name (as it appears on your profile)
   - The specific information you want to update
   - The new content to replace the existing information

2. **Or open a GitHub Issue** (if you have a GitHub account):
   - Visit the [RC42 repository](https://github.com/) *(link to be updated)*
   - Open a new issue using the "Update Profile" template
   - Fill in the requested information

### What Can Be Updated?

You can request updates to any of the following:

- Affiliation and position
- Biography
- Research interests
- Selected publications
- Academic links (ORCID, Google Scholar, LinkedIn, website)
- Photo
- Contact information
- Country/city

### Processing Time

Profile updates are processed by the RC42 board or designated editor. Please allow a few days for the update to be reflected on the portal.

::: {.placeholder-notice}
In a future version of this portal, a self-service profile update form will be available, allowing members to submit updates directly through the website.
:::
